title: avena fatua var. glaberrima
intro: Avena fatua var. glaberrima, also known as smooth oat grass, is a variety of wild oats that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Avena fatua var. glaberrima include soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting relaxation and sleep. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
